attributes.description: Namespace resource usage overview with CPU/memory trends, pod counts, container restarts, and namespace drilldowns.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

columns.label: Avg memory working set limit utilization

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
| STATS
    pod_name = MAX(k8s.pod.name),
    deployment_name = MAX(k8s.deployment.name),
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    cpu_limit = AVG(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
    mem_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    mem_limit = AVG(k8s.container.memory_limit),
    vol_avail = LAST(k8s.volume.available, CASE(k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    vol_cap = LAST(k8s.volume.capacity, CASE(k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    container_restarts = LAST(k8s.container.restarts, CASE(k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name, k8s.volume.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS
    pod_name = MAX(pod_name),
    deployment_name = MAX(deployment_name),
    pod_cpu_usage = MAX(cpu_usage),
    pod_mem_ws = MAX(mem_ws),
    pod_cpu_limit = SUM(cpu_limit),
    pod_mem_limit = SUM(mem_limit),
    pod_vol_avail = SUM(vol_avail),
    pod_vol_cap = SUM(vol_cap),
    pod_restarts = SUM(container_restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS
    pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(pod_name),
    deployments = COUNT_DISTINCT(deployment_name),
    cpu_usage = SUM(pod_cpu_usage),
    cpu_limit = SUM(pod_cpu_limit),
    mem_ws = SUM(pod_mem_ws),
    mem_limit = SUM(pod_mem_limit),
    vol_avail = SUM(pod_vol_avail),
    vol_cap = SUM(pod_vol_cap),
    restarts = SUM(pod_restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name
| EVAL
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0)),
    cpu_usage = COALESCE(cpu_usage, 0.0),
    mem_ws = COALESCE(mem_ws, 0.0),
    cpu_limit_util = CASE(cpu_limit > 0, ROUND(cpu_usage / cpu_limit, 4), NULL),
    mem_limit_util = CASE(mem_limit > 0, ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(mem_limit), 4), NULL),
    disk_util = CASE(vol_cap > 0, ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(vol_avail) / TO_DOUBLE(vol_cap), 4), NULL)
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name, restarts, pods, deployments, cpu_usage, cpu_limit_util, mem_ws, mem_limit_util, disk_util
| SORT restarts DESC

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
| STATS
    pod_name = MAX(k8s.pod.name),
    deployment_name = MAX(k8s.deployment.name),
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    cpu_limit = AVG(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
    mem_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    mem_limit = AVG(k8s.container.memory_limit),
    vol_avail = LAST(k8s.volume.available, CASE(k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    vol_cap = LAST(k8s.volume.capacity, CASE(k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    container_restarts = LAST(k8s.container.restarts, CASE(k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name, k8s.volume.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS
    pod_name = MAX(pod_name),
    deployment_name = MAX(deployment_name),
    pod_cpu_usage = MAX(cpu_usage),
    pod_mem_ws = MAX(mem_ws),
    pod_cpu_limit = SUM(cpu_limit),
    pod_mem_limit = SUM(mem_limit),
    pod_vol_avail = SUM(vol_avail),
    pod_vol_cap = SUM(vol_cap),
    pod_restarts = SUM(container_restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS
    pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(pod_name),
    deployments = COUNT_DISTINCT(deployment_name),
    cpu_usage = SUM(pod_cpu_usage),
    cpu_limit = SUM(pod_cpu_limit),
    mem_ws = SUM(pod_mem_ws),
    mem_limit = SUM(pod_mem_limit),
    vol_avail = SUM(pod_vol_avail),
    vol_cap = SUM(pod_vol_cap),
    restarts = SUM(pod_restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name
| EVAL
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0)),
    cpu_usage = COALESCE(cpu_usage, 0.0),
    mem_ws = COALESCE(mem_ws, 0.0),
    cpu_limit_util = CASE(cpu_limit > 0, ROUND(cpu_usage / cpu_limit, 4), NULL),
    mem_limit_util = CASE(mem_limit > 0, ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(mem_limit), 4), NULL),
    disk_util = CASE(vol_cap > 0, ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(vol_avail) / TO_DOUBLE(vol_cap), 4), NULL)
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name, restarts, pods, deployments, cpu_usage, cpu_limit_util, mem_ws, mem_limit_util, disk_util
| SORT restarts DESC

embeddableConfig.description: Namespaces ranked by container restarts (highest first). Click a namespace name to drill into namespace details, or a cluster to drill into cluster details. Pod and deployment counts are latest values. Avg CPU usage, avg CPU limit utilization, avg memory working set and avg memory working set limit utilization are averaged over the selected time range. Disk utilization and container restarts reflect the latest collected values.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS ns_count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS ns_count = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of namespaces across all clusters, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_cpu = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS cpu_usage = SUM(pod_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC, cpu_usage DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, cpu_usage

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_cpu = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS cpu_usage = SUM(pod_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC, cpu_usage DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, cpu_usage

embeddableConfig.description: Shows the top namespaces by CPU usage over time. Use this to find namespaces consuming the most CPU.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by CPU usage

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS container_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name,
    timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS restarts = SUM(container_restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC, restarts DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, restarts

TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS container_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name,
    timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS restarts = SUM(container_restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC, restarts DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, restarts

embeddableConfig.description: Shows the top namespaces by container restarts over time. Spikes can indicate unstable workloads.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by container restarts

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
  AND container.memory.major_page_faults IS NOT NULL
| STATS container_faults = MAX(container.memory.major_page_faults) - MIN(container.memory.major_page_faults)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name,
    timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS oom_events = SUM(container_faults)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC, oom_events DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, oom_events

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
  AND container.memory.major_page_faults IS NOT NULL
| STATS container_faults = MAX(container.memory.major_page_faults) - MIN(container.memory.major_page_faults)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name,
    timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS oom_events = SUM(container_faults)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC, oom_events DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, oom_events

embeddableConfig.description: Shows the top namespaces by OOM events over time. OOM spikes usually indicate memory pressure or undersized limits.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by OOM events

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_pods = COUNT(*),
    running_pods = COUNT(*) WHERE phase == 2
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp
| EVAL non_running_pods = total_pods - running_pods
| SORT @timestamp ASC, non_running_pods DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name, @timestamp, non_running_pods

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_pods = COUNT(*),
    running_pods = COUNT(*) WHERE phase == 2
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp
| EVAL non_running_pods = total_pods - running_pods
| SORT @timestamp ASC, non_running_pods DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name, @timestamp, non_running_pods

embeddableConfig.description: Shows the top namespaces by non-running pods over time. Sustained non-running pods can indicate scheduling or workload health issues.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by non-running pods

attributes.title: [Kubernetes OTel] Namespaces
